titleStmt.title: SII 27.144: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 145. (A.R. No. 107 of 1939-40.) TIRVOTTŪR, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Naṭarāja-maṇḍapa in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

It registers a remission of 150 honnu due to the king towards the taxes jōḍi, śūlavari, paṭṭaḍe and nūlāva, from the people of Tiruvottūr, to enable them to reconstruct the village which was destroyed by floods, which fact was reported to the king by Mādirājana Channaya and Choka-nāyinār, and records provision made for worship etc. to god Vēdapurināthadēva. The remission was made by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Sāḷuva Narasiṅgayyadēva.

It is dated the cyclic year Virōdhi, Māgha śu. 15, the details being insufficient for verification. The cyclic year, falling in the reignperiod of Virūpāksha, corresponds to 1469-70 A.D., when the tithi occurred on 1470 A.D., January 17.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . virōdhi saṁvatsarada magha śu 15 lu śrīrmamahāmaṁḍalēśvaraēach line commences with a sypher.
mēdinī mīsaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva sāḷuva narasiṁgayyadēvamahā Arasugaḷu tiruvatūra
stānadavarige Ārpitada kāryyaniṁmma dēvastāna nelavanu Elavanū toṟebaṁdu Ettikoṁḍu
Ūranū toṟi Ēṟikoṁḍu hōyiteṁdu mādirājana ceṁnayanū cokanāyināreŪ hēḷi
dadu AdakedēvastānakeU ŪrigeU Upadrava viladahāṁge ṟakala kaṭisuvadake niṁmadēvastānake
nīū Aramanege tetubaha jōḍi śūlavari paṭṭaḍe nūlāyasaha nūṟa Ayivattu hoṁnanu sarvamānya
vāgi vēdapurinātha dēvarige dāreya Eṟidu koṭivāgi nīū jōḍiyi hoṁnanu varisi [aleŪṟa]
kaṭṭisinū tēru tirunāḷu tirupaṇiyanaṁ viśēṣapūjeyāgi naḍasuvabahudu . śrī rāmacaṁdra
Digital edition of SII 27.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
